component.name: SidebarItem
component.script:
sub init() m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.icon = m.top.findNode("icon") m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.focusIndicator = m.top.findNode("focusIndicator") end sub
sub onItemContentChange() content = m.top.itemContent if content <> invalid m.title.text = UCase(content.title) end if end sub
sub onFocusPercentChange() p = m.top.focusPercent ' Smooth transition of colors and opacity m.background.opacity = p * 0.2 m.focusIndicator.opacity = p if p > 0.5 m.title.color = "0xFFFFFFFF" else m.title.color = "0x888888FF" end if ' Scale icon slightly on focus scale = 1.0 + (p * 0.1) m.icon.scale = [scale, scale] end sub
